mapper.sql: rr.id, rr.request_no, rr.student_name, CASE WHEN rr.dorm_area_snapshot IS NULL OR rr.dorm_area_snapshot = '' THEN CONCAT(rr.building_no_snapshot, '-', rr.room_no_snapshot) ELSE CONCAT(rr.dorm_area_snapshot, ' ', rr.building_no_snapshot, '-', rr.room_no_snapshot) END AS location_text, rr.fault_category, rr.status, rr.submitted_at, wo.assigned_at AS assignedAt, wo.accepted_at AS acceptedAt
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(submitted_at, '%Y-%m') AS month_label, COUNT(*) AS total_requests, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_requests, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS completion_rate FROM repair_requests WHERE submitted_at >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(submitted_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month_label DESC

SELECT fault_category, COUNT(*) AS total_requests, ROUND(COUNT(*) / totals.total_count * 100, 2) AS percentage FROM repair_requests CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM repair_requests WHERE submitted_at >= #{startDate} ) totals WHERE submitted_at >= #{startDate} GROUP BY fault_category, totals.total_count ORDER BY total_requests DESC, fault_category ASC

SELECT dorm_area_snapshot AS dorm_area, building_no_snapshot AS building_no, COUNT(*) AS total_requests FROM repair_requests WHERE submitted_at >= #{startDate} GROUP BY dorm_area_snapshot, building_no_snapshot ORDER BY total_requests DESC, dorm_area_snapshot ASC, building_no_snapshot ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT stage_label, total_count, overdue_count, ROUND(CASE WHEN total_count = 0 THEN 0 ELSE overdue_count / total_count * 100 END, 2) AS overdue_rate FROM ( SELECT 'PENDING_ASSIGN' AS stage_label, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN submitted_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 HOUR) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdue_count FROM repair_requests WHERE status = 'SUBMITTED'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'PENDING_ACCEPT' AS stage_label, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN assigned_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdue_count FROM work_orders WHERE status = 'ASSIGNED'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'PROCESSING' AS stage_label, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(accepted_at, assigned_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 48 HOUR) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdue_count FROM work_orders WHERE status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS') ) summary_rows

SELECT
FROM repair_requests rr LEFT JOIN work_orders wo ON wo.repair_request_id = rr.id
rr.status = 'SUBMITTED' AND rr.submitted_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 HOUR)
wo.status = 'ASSIGNED' AND wo.assigned_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 HOUR)
wo.status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS') AND COALESCE(wo.accepted_at, wo.assigned_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 48 HOUR)
ORDER BY rr.submitted_at DESC, rr.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
